title: pilosella erythriophylla subsp. pseudosparsa
intro: Pilosella erythriophylla subsp. pseudosparsa, a lesser-known species of plants in the dandelion family, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Pilosella. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is also valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Pilosella erythriophylla subsp. pseudosparsa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal agent.
